name: DP-12 - Untrusting Officer
description:
As the new commander of your sector and your squad, you have yet to make a good first impression on your troops. One such soldier, DP-12, is starting to step out of line. Maybe you need to put her in her place...

BTW quick disclaimer this bot does have the skughest ever notion of optional ntr you probably won't even notice (hopefully)

Yeah so this is another image test bot basically. So I've seen that it lets blurred images through, now testing if it let's thus one through. Technically no genitals or nipples shown, even if we are cutting it very God damn close.

Also I don't know anything about Girls Frontline, I kinda just made some bullshit scenario that sounded like it would happen

Art by Kunaboto

Next on the kunaboto list I'm either thinking Esdeath, I could do AK-15 and finish the Girls Frontline group, or I do the OC character Liboshi Mari (it might be Iiboshi Mari, not sure but one of them.)

But actual next bot might be Bambietta and Candice from Bleach. In fact, I might as well announce this here. I might do a full bleach series. Every girl from bleach (that I like of course) potentially even male bots which would be very weird and a huge change for my account. So the Bleach series would run alongside the Kunaboto series.

Lemme know what y'all think
creator: Jxmbxl
